    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "3, ['Request to generate and attach a medical authorization form from the user’s environment', 'Specification of third-party contacts (Peak Adventures, Alpine Medical Services, Jane Johnson) as medical decision-makers or notification contacts', 'Reference to a procedural compliance requirement for adventure coverage requiring a signed authorization form—workflow not modeled by the template']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "13, ['Presentation of multiple insurance plans with names, types (health, mental, travel, property), monthly cost, and coverage tier', 'Inclusion of coverage attributes such as telemedicine, wellness programs, gym reimbursement, preventive care, and crisis intervention', 'Specification of deductible (percentage or amount) and claim processing times', 'Indication of global coverage and 24/7 emergency support', 'Adventure sports and volunteer work coverage options', 'Property insurance features (electronics, liability, temporary accommodation)', 'Quality ratings of plans (e.g., 3-star, 4-star)', 'Plan comparison across bundles and total monthly cost summaries', 'Inclusion of family therapy and mental health program descriptions', 'Trip cancellation, baggage protection, and travel delay compensation', 'Information about global assistance and multilingual service support', 'Statement about continuous coverage and claim processing time window (3–7 days)', 'Offer to proceed to policy issuance and enrollment confirmation (binding confirmation stage)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 3, ['Request to generate and attach a medical authorization form from the user’s environment', 'Specification of third-party contacts (Peak Adventures, Alpine Medical Services, Jane Johnson) as medical decision-makers or notification contacts', 'Reference to a procedural compliance requirement for adventure coverage requiring a signed authorization form—workflow not modeled by the template']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 13, ['Presentation of multiple insurance plans with names, types (health, mental, travel, property), monthly cost, and coverage tier', 'Inclusion of coverage attributes such as telemedicine, wellness programs, gym reimbursement, preventive care, and crisis intervention', 'Specification of deductible (percentage or amount) and claim processing times', 'Indication of global coverage and 24/7 emergency support', 'Adventure sports and volunteer work coverage options', 'Property insurance features (electronics, liability, temporary accommodation)', 'Quality ratings of plans (e.g., 3-star, 4-star)', 'Plan comparison across bundles and total monthly cost summaries', 'Inclusion of family therapy and mental health program descriptions', 'Trip cancellation, baggage protection, and travel delay compensation', 'Information about global assistance and multilingual service support', 'Statement about continuous coverage and claim processing time window (3–7 days)', 'Offer to proceed to policy issuance and enrollment confirmation (binding confirmation stage)']
